title: Thinking
scope: A read-only operator surface for inspecting Skipper's cognition: working memory, the reasoning log, the token budget, and the active cognitive (thinking) domains. A required core viewer. NOT a control surface — it observes the agent's thinking, it doesn't change it.

specs.title: Inspect working memory & reasoning
specs.behavior: The inspector shows Skipper's working memory, reasoning log, and active cognitive domains.

specs.title: View the token budget
specs.behavior: The viewer shows the agent's current token budget and usage.
